pack_name: MTT Live Population Strategy Scenario Review Pack
purpose: Provide app-ready scenario review records with no empty fields, while avoiding unsafe fake 169-cell chart generation.
field_integrity_rule: No field is left blank. Use NONE, NOT_APPLICABLE, MODEL_DESIGN_REQUIRED, or SOURCE_REQUIRED where a normal value is unavailable.
global_import_policy: Do not overwrite approved snapshots; do not infer missing hands as FOLD; do not copy paid/gated charts; preserve CALL_JAM; keep population drafts hidden from default trainer until approved.

global_population_principles.name: Use GTO as baseline, not rigid truth
global_population_principles.source_basis: PokerCoaching 2026 GTO preflop basics and GTO Wizard MTT trainer guidance
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: Start from approved/seed chart, then adjust only when a clear live population tendency exists.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Show as global note above strategy review matrix; never convert this principle into hand-cell ranges automatically.
global_population_principles.risk_control: Do not approve a chart from this principle alone.

global_population_principles.name: Live fields often under-defend blinds
global_population_principles.source_basis: Upswing 2025 live championship event exploit article and PokerCoaching 2026 population tendency article
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: Steal more from CO/BTN/SB when blinds are tight, but keep OOP dominated offsuit hands conservative.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Applies to RFI, SB first-in, and late-position facing-open review notes.
global_population_principles.risk_control: Owner must review exact Kx/Qx offsuit and suited-trash borders.

global_population_principles.name: Live 3-bets are often value-heavy
global_population_principles.source_basis: PokerCoaching 2026 population tendencies and PokerCoaching live exploit article
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: Overfold marginal continues versus unknown live 3-bets, especially OOP and versus early-position ranges.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Facing-3bet scenario stubs only; not a 169-cell source.
global_population_principles.risk_control: Do not regenerate the quarantined facing-3bet pack.

global_population_principles.name: 3-bet more linearly when villains under-4-bet
global_population_principles.source_basis: PokerCoaching live exploit article and Upswing 2025 live preflop exploits
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: Use more value-heavy linear 3-bets with hands like strong broadways/pairs versus folders/callers who rarely 4-bet bluff.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Review note for facing-open seed charts, especially IP versus HJ/CO and blind defense.
global_population_principles.risk_control: If villain 4-bets aggressively, revert to approved chart baseline.

global_population_principles.name: Respond tighter to larger live open sizes
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: Large opens mostly reduce calling frequency; do not blindly defend the same chart versus 3.5x-5x opens.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Scenario note for all facing-open families.
global_population_principles.risk_control: Use a note/adjustment tag, not a separate chart unless sourced.

global_population_principles.name: Avoid push/fold-only simplification above true short-stack spots
global_population_principles.source_basis: Upswing 2026 push-fold update and GTO Wizard final-table facing-3bet article
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: At 10-15bb, jam/fold can be a useful simplification, but raise/call/limp options can outperform binary push-fold.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Review note for 15bb RFI, SB first-in, and facing-open population drafts.
global_population_principles.risk_control: Do not create 40bb/70bb open-jam call charts without a verified source.

global_population_principles.name: SB first-in can include limp strategy
global_population_principles.source_basis: Upswing 2026 push-fold discussion and Codex population research
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: Use limp for playable lower-EV hands, raise strong linear hands, and jam only in shallow-stack pressure spots.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Applies to the four SB first-in population drafts.

global_population_principles.name: BB versus SB limp uses CHECK, not CALL
global_population_principles.source_basis: Codex population-draft risk review and basic poker action semantics
global_population_principles.simplified_rule: After SB completes, BB passive option is CHECK; raise/jam punish ranges are villain-dependent.
global_population_principles.app_usage: Applies to all BB vs SB limp review rows.

scenario_records.population_strategy_summary: Approved RFI baseline for UTG at 15bb. Use as main default. Live exploit: open disciplined early, steal wider late when blinds overfold.
scenario_records.latest_research_alignment: 2025-2026 public sources support a GTO-baseline-plus-live-population approach: late-position steal pressure when blinds overfold, tighter responses to large opens and value-heavy 3-bets, linear/value-heavy 3-betting versus under-4-betting pools, and avoiding static push/fold-only assumptions.
scenario_records.simplified_live_rule: Open chart baseline; widen CO/BTN/SB only when blinds are tight; tighten early if table is 3-bet active.
